ddls:
CREATE TABLE "incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each incident */,
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the offense related to the incident */,
  "offense_code" INTEGER /* Code representing the type of offense */,
  "offense_code_extension" INTEGER /* Extension code for further classification of the offense */,
  "offense_type_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the type of offense */,
  "offense_category_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the category of the offense */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year in which the incident occurred */,
  "first_occurrence_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the first occurrence */,
  "last_occurrence_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the last occurrence */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date and time the incident was reported */,
  "incident_address" TEXT /* Address where the incident occurred */,
  "geo_x" INTEGER /* X coordinate for geographic location */,
  "geo_y" INTEGER /* Y coordinate for geographic location */,
  "geo_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the geographic location */,
  "geo_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the geographic location */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district where the incident occurred */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct where the incident occurred */,
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* ID of the neighborhood where the incident occurred */,
  "is_crime" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the incident is a crime */,
  "is_traffic" INTEGER /* Indicator of whether the incident is traffic-related */,
  "victim_count" INTEGER /* Number of victims involved in the incident */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the incident */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the incident was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_offense_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_id") REFERENCES offenses ("offense_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_precinct_id FOREIGN KEY ("precinct_id") REFERENCES precincts ("precinct_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_neighborhood_id FOREIGN KEY ("neighborhood_id") REFERENCES neighborhoods ("neighborhood_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_offense_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_category_id") REFERENCES offense_categories ("offense_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incidents_offense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_type_id") REFERENCES offense_types ("offense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offenses" (
  "offense_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of offense */,
  "offense_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offense */,
  "offense_type_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the type of offense */,
  "offense_category_id" INTEGER /* ID referencing the category of the offense */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offense_types" (
  "offense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offense type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offense type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offense_categories" (
  "offense_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offense category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offense category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "districts" (
  "district_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each district */,
  "district_name" TEXT /* Name of the district */,
  "chief_officer" TEXT /* Name of the chief law enforcement officer */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the district */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "precincts" (
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each precinct */,
  "precinct_name" TEXT /* Name of the precinct */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the precinct is part of */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the precinct */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("precinct_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "neighborhoods" (
  "neighborhood_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each neighborhood */,
  "neighborhood_name" TEXT /* Name of the neighborhood */,
  "precinct_id" INTEGER /* ID of the precinct the neighborhood is part of */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the neighborhood */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("neighborhood_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., officer, analyst, admin) */,
  "district_id" INTEGER /* ID of the district the user is assigned to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_district_id FOREIGN KEY ("district_id") REFERENCES districts ("district_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_updates" (
  "update_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each update */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being updated */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the update */,
  "update_description" TEXT /* Description of the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("update_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_updates_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident the report is for */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date and time the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., public, internal) */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the incident being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES incidents ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
